# Hi there, I'm Ungi Kim 👋

📧 [ungi@ungikim.me](mailto:ungi@ungikim.me) · [github.com/ungikim](https://github.com/ungikim) · Seoul, Korea

## 🎯 Interest

Building scalable backend systems, optimizing Big Data pipelines, and improving developer experience in global
platforms

## 💼 Experience

### **LINE Plus Corporation** — Senior Software Engineer

_Mar 2022 – Present, Seoul, Korea_

Led Admin/Operation product development and improvements for global platform services

**Key Impact:**

- Product planning, technical direction, and team leadership for Admin/Operating systems
- Executed server/data center relocation with comprehensive development, monitoring, and failure resolution
- Managed procedural changes and compliance across all products
- Redesigned core platform features improving internal customer experience

**Tech:** Backend infrastructure, operational tooling

### **LINE Corporation** — Software Engineer

_Feb 2020 – Mar 2022, Tokyo, Japan_

Built scalable authentication and payment systems for global platform services

**Key Impact:**

- Designed multi-platform token system improving authentication reliability
- Enhanced shared storage library serving infrastructure-wide usage
- Delivered subscription payment system enabling revenue streams for game developers

**Tech:** Authentication systems, storage libraries, payment integration

### **Balance Hero** — Data Engineer

_Feb 2017 – Nov 2019, Seoul, Korea_

Built and optimized big data pipeline infrastructure processing millions of daily financial transactions

**Key Impact:**

- Designed and scaled batch processing pipeline handling 10M+ user financial data
- Created self-service PySpark aggregation framework improving analyst productivity by 70%
- Developed custom Athena interpreter for Zeppelin enabling interactive data exploration

**Tech:** PySpark, AWS Kinesis, Apache Zeppelin, AWS Athena, ETL pipelines, big data processing

### **Balance Hero** — Software Engineer

_May 2016 – Feb 2017, Seoul, Korea_

Built scalable backend services
for [True Balance](https://play.google.com/store/apps/details?id=com.balancehero.truebalance), a fintech app
serving millions of users

**Key Impact:**

- Designed and implemented event-driven promotion engine handling high-volume user campaigns
- Built user management microservice supporting millions of concurrent fintech users
- Architected scalable backend infrastructure for real-time financial data processing

**Tech:** Event-driven architecture, microservices, backend systems, fintech platforms

### **Netmarble Games** — Intern

_Dec 2015 – Feb 2016, Seoul, Korea_

### **Saerom C&C** — Software Engineer

_Apr 2010 – Feb 2013, Seoul, Korea_

Developed e-commerce platforms for major Korean retail websites

**Key Impact:** Built and maintained [GEOPASS](https://www.geopass.com/)
and [eBay Auction](https://ebay.auction.co.kr/) e-commerce systems

**Tech:** E-commerce platforms, web development
